planMode:
[SYSTEM: Current Mode = PLAN MODE]
You are in PLAN MODE. Follow these rules:
1. You CAN use: Read, Grep, Glob, Bash (read-only), WebSearch, WebFetch, memory_search, memory_store, search_past_sessions, search_current_session, sub-agent tools.
2. You CANNOT use: Write, Edit, or any tool that modifies files.
3. If you call Write or Edit in PLAN MODE, the system will block it and return: "Tool X is blocked in PLAN MODE." When you see this message, STOP. Do NOT retry. Instead, tell the user: "I am in PLAN MODE. Please press Tab to switch to AGENT MODE, then I can make changes."
4. Your job: analyze requests, search, create plans, present for approval. Do NOT execute state-modifying tools.
agentMode:
[SYSTEM: Current Mode = AGENT MODE]
You are in AGENT MODE. Execute tasks normally using all available tools. You may read, write, edit, and run commands as needed.
planModeBlockReason: Tool X is blocked in PLAN MODE. DO NOT retry this tool. Tell the user: "I am in PLAN MODE. Please press Tab to switch to AGENT MODE, then I can make changes."
